summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Territory Atlas iteration 3 - sidebar redesign, color picker, hover tooltips, and layer controls. All backend APIs (7/7 tests passed). Frontend features mostly working with one bug fixed (switch toggle double-click issue). All new features verified: file upload dropdown, layer groups, color picker, hover tooltips, radius controls, map style toggle.

ui_bugs.issue: Switch toggle was double-firing due to both row onClick and Switch onCheckedChange handlers - FIXED by adding stopPropagation wrapper

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ returns welcome message (PASS)
Backend: GET /api/data/city returns 525+ city records with proper structure (PASS)
Backend: GET /api/data/county returns 1859+ county records (PASS)
Backend: GET /api/data/wheat returns wheat data with Acres layer (PASS)
Backend: GET /api/analytics/top-zones returns aggregated top states (PASS)
Backend: Analytics with layer filter works (PASS)
Backend: Data integrity - all datasets have records (PASS)
Frontend: File type selector dropdown visible with City/County/Wheat options (PASS)
Frontend: Upload button label changes based on selected type (PASS)
Frontend: Layer controls grouped in 'Point Layers' (4 layers) and 'Density Layers' (4 layers) (PASS)
Frontend: Collapsible layer groups show/hide on click with active count (e.g., 4/4) (PASS)
Frontend: Switch toggle turns layers on/off and changes map visibility (PASS - after fix)
Frontend: Inactive layers appear at reduced opacity (opacity-40) (PASS - after fix)
Frontend: Color picker dot opens popover with 15 preset colors (PASS)
Frontend: Changing layer color updates map choropleth (PASS - tested Acres to red)
Frontend: Radius sub-controls appear for Feed Mills, Grain Fumigation, Customers when active (PASS)
Frontend: Radius 25mi/50mi/100mi buttons visible and clickable (PASS)
Frontend: Hover tooltip appears on counties showing county/state/total (PASS - 'Buffalo Co., Nebraska — Total: 1,816')
Frontend: Click popup appears on counties showing detailed breakdown (PASS - Dickinson County, Kansas)
Frontend: County choropleth correctly shading with FIPS-normalized matching (PASS)
Frontend: Mapbox map renders properly with all data (PASS)
Frontend: Satellite/Street view toggle works (PASS)
Frontend: Analytics panel shows top states with correct data (PASS - Kansas #1 with 6.6M)
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: LayerControls.js - Switch click was propagating to parent row causing double-toggle. Added stopPropagation wrapper around Switch component.
test_credentials: No authentication required. Mapbox token configured in .env
seed_data_creation: Data already loaded in MongoDB from previous session - 525 city records, 1859 county records, wheat data with Acres layer
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working. Bug fixed in LayerControls.js (switch toggle stopPropagation). Key data-testids: file-type-selector, upload-file-button, layer-group-Point Layers, layer-group-Density Layers, layer-toggle-{name}, layer-item-{name}, color-picker-{name}, radius-toggle-{name}, radius-miles-{name}-{miles}, hover-tooltip, map-popup, map-style-toggle, analytics-panel, top-zone-{n}. Mapbox needs 5 seconds to load.

sidebar_redesign.upload_button: Dynamic label based on selected type
sidebar_redesign.layer_groups: Point Layers (4) and Density Layers (4) with collapsible headers
sidebar_redesign.active_count: Shows X/Y format in group header

layer_controls.inactive_opacity: opacity-40 class applied when layer is off
layer_controls.radius_controls: Visible for Feed Mills, Grain Fumigation, Customers

map_features.hover_tooltip: Dark tooltip near cursor showing county/state/total
map_features.dynamic_colors: Layer colors update map in real-time

bug_fixed.issue: Switch toggle in LayerControls was not working - clicking switch caused no state change
bug_fixed.root_cause: Both the parent row onClick and Switch onCheckedChange were calling onToggle, causing double-toggle (on->off->on = no change)
bug_fixed.fix: Wrapped Switch in a div with onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()} to prevent event bubbling
